# IBMSA — International Business Management Services

> IBMSA helps SMEs, founders, community organisations, and growth-focused teams across Australia, Cameroon, and Africa with strategic planning, business development, digital marketing, coaching, and technology support.

## Core language paths
- /en/index.html: English homepage
- /fr/index.html: Page d'accueil française

## Core services
- /en/strategic-planning.html: Strategic planning and business turnaround
- /en/business-development.html: Business development and growth
- /en/coaching-mentoring.html: Coaching and mentoring
- /en/digital-marketing.html: Digital marketing
- /en/technology-support.html: Technology support
- /en/social-media-management.html: Social media management
- /en/training-conferences.html: Training and conferences

## French services
- /fr/planification-strategique.html
- /fr/developpement-commercial.html
- /fr/coaching-mentorat.html
- /fr/marketing-digital.html
- /fr/support-technologique.html
- /fr/gestion-reseaux-sociaux.html
- /fr/formations-conferences.html

## Trust and contact
- /en/about.html
- /fr/a-propos.html
